eligible_applicant_type: Projects working with fiscal sponsors meeting financial standards
geographic_restrictions: Baltimore City and Baltimore County, Maryland
demographic_requirements: Programs must serve residents of Baltimore City or Baltimore County, with priority given to organizations primarily serving these areas.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits with 501(c)(3) status or fiscal sponsors meeting financial standards are eligible. Projects must align with BCF's focus areas (stronger schools or vibrant neighborhoods) and serve Baltimore City or Baltimore County residents. Typical awards range from $1,000 to $45,000, with a median of $20,000.
